words.zh: a. 精選的, 採摘的, 已收穫的, 截出的, 已清除的, 有尖頭的, 多刺的
n. 傢伙, 詞典, 誓言(書)

words.def: the person or thing chosen or selected
words.zh: n. 精選, 選擇, 掘, 精華, 牙籤, 鶴嘴鋤

words.def: a small cube with 1 to 6 spots on the six faces; used in gambling to generate random numbers
words.zh: vi. 死亡, 消逝, 平息, 熄滅, 漠然, 渴望

words.def: water frozen in the solid state
words.zh: n. 冰, 冰淇淋, 糖衣, 冷若冰霜, 矜持, 賄賂

words.def: a young person of either sex
words.zh: n. 小山羊, 小山羊肉, 小孩, 欺騙
